original:
You will now exit to the text area in order to modify your control overlay settings.

Use the directional buttons to reposition the controls, the magnifying glass buttons to scale the controls, the plus/minus buttons to adjust the opacity, and the palette button to toggle color options.

Remember to Save your settings if you want to keep your changes.

(When positioning the controls, try not to overlap any essential gameplay UI elements.)

original: When enabled, scanline graphics and other backdrop elements will be rendered as opaque instead of semi-transparent. This may help with increasing performance on older devices.

original: When enabled, vector images with unique filter effects, such as glowing edges on strokes, will be visible. Disabling this may help with increasing performance on older devices, or may correct visible rendering issues caused by devices that do not fully support SVG filter blocks.
translation: 启用后，具有独特滤镜效果的矢量图像（如描边上的发光边缘）将可见。禁用此功能可能有助于提高旧设备的性能，或纠正因设备不完全支持SVG滤镜块而导致的可见渲染问题。

original: When enabled, vector images with unique morphing transitions, will be animated. Disabling this may help with increasing performance on older devices, or may correct visible rendering issues caused by devices that do not fully support SVG morphing transitions.
translation: 启用后，具有独特变形过渡效果的矢量图像将会呈现动画效果。禁用此功能可能有助于提高旧设备的性能，或者可以纠正因设备不完全支持SVG变形过渡而导致的可见渲染问题。

original: Configure how the minimap responds to input. Autopathing allows you to touch/click a specific room and the game will calculate a route to take you to that room. Directional allows you to touch areas of the map to move in specific directions.
translation: 配置小地图如何响应输入。自动寻路允许你触摸/点击特定房间，游戏将计算一条路线带你前往该房间。方向模式允许你触摸地图区域以向特定方向移动。

original: When enabled, the sidebar will change to the legacy layout scheme. This layout will incorporate large buttons and add a Map/Stats toggle button to the sidebar. Combat and Passive stats will display depending on the position of the map.
translation: 启用后，侧边栏将更改为传统布局方案。此布局将包含大按钮，并在侧边栏中添加地图/统计切换按钮。战斗和被动统计数据将根据地图的位置显示。

translation: 自动关闭全地图

original: When enabled, while actively navigating with the full map open, any scene that appears and prevents navigation will automatically close the map to readily view the scene.
translation: 启用后，在全地图打开状态下主动导航时，任何出现并阻碍导航的场景都会自动关闭地图，以便直接查看场景。
context: <<POS:17301189>> createElement("span", ..., 'When enabled, while actively navigating with the f')
